Code-inspection security audit of changed surfaces (internal/assistant/capturefallback/, facade.go hooks, PgStore pending_clarify column, migration 052). Scanned for hardcoded secrets, IDOR (body-identity extraction), input validation, auth bypass. No hardcoded credentials. Auth delegated to bearer middleware (httpadapter/middleware.go); identity sourced from bearer session, not request body. pending_clarify JSONB rows scoped by (user_id, transport, transport_user_id) — no cross-user dedup paths. OWASP A01/A02/A03/A07: no findings on changed code. Claim Source: interpreted (static code review; no PoC executed). Verdict: SECURE.

executionHistory.summary: Bootstrapped the authoritative cross-cutting capture-as-fallback policy referenced by specs 061/064/066/068/069 but owned by none. 11 BDD scenarios (SCN-074-A01..A11) cover the trigger contract, provenance distinction from spec 008 explicit captures, same-user dedup window (in and out), forbidden cross-user dedup, abandoned-clarification fallback, IntentTrace + counter wiring, fail-loud SST, inviolability of the policy, no-content-interpretation-at-capture-time, and identical acknowledgement shape across all transports.

Created design.md for capture-as-fallback policy, resolving the central policy module, provenance metadata table, strict per-user dedup, abandoned clarification handling, canonical acknowledgement, fail-loud SST, and scenario-to-test mapping for SCN-074-A01..A11.

Created planning artifacts for SCN-074-A01..A11: five sequential scopes, scenario-manifest.json, test-plan.json, uservalidation.md, and planning-only report.md. Status remains in_progress with planMaturityOnly=true.

Mode metadata reconciliation only. spec.md declares Workflow Mode: full-delivery (authoritative owner intent set 2026-05-31); prior bubbles.plan run defensively wrote workflowMode=product-to-planning, statusCeiling=specs_hardened, planningOnly=true while operating under a planning-only workflow. Reconciled state.json to workflowMode=full-delivery, statusCeiling=done, planningOnly=false; preserved planMaturityOnly=true because planning artifacts are complete and no implementation evidence exists yet. certification.status remains in_progress; no implementation, test, or certification claims made.

LIVE PASS captured for the unit eligibility row: `go test -count=1 -run '^TestCaptureFallbackEligible$' ./internal/assistant/` returned `--- PASS` with all 4 sub-tests, RC=0 — proves the SCOPE-074-04A DoD item 'Eligibility gate excludes confirm-state and in-flight clarify-state turns (proved by a unit test)' which is now marked [x]. BLOCKED: live TP-074-12 + TP-074-18 integration runs still cannot complete because `smackerel-test-smackerel-core-1` fails its docker healthcheck on startup (HTTP listener on :8080 never binds within the ~30s healthcheck window because core blocks on the 60s ML-sidecar readiness wait). Reproduced on two consecutive freshly-built attempts. Routed as F074-04A-TEST-STACK-CORE-HEALTH (owner: deploy/test-infrastructure). Four SCOPE-074-04A DoD items remain unchecked with explicit reasons. See report.md `## SCOPE-074-04A Re-Validation Pass (bubbles.implement, 2026-06-01b)` for full evidence.

SCOPE-074-04A close-out pass plus SCOPE-074-04B scaffolding. Test-stack core healthcheck blocker (F074-04A-TEST-STACK-CORE-HEALTH) confirmed cleared on this host (live core comes up healthy in ~30s). RED→GREEN cycle for SCOPE-074-04A: initial live `./smackerel.sh test integration --go-run '^TestCaptureFallbackPolicy_TP_074_12|^TestCaptureFallbackInviolable'` failed (TP-074-12 FacadeHook FAIL, TP-074-18 FAIL — `Status=unavailable error_cause=internal_error`, `fallback count = 0`) because `runCaptureFallback` was passing an empty `msg.TransportMessageID` through to `capturefallback.Request.TransportMessageID`, which became `dec.SourceTurnID=""`, which `validatePayload` rejects. Fix in `internal/assistant/facade.go`: synthesize `sourceTurnID` from `facadeTurnIDFromTime(emittedAt)` when `msg.TransportMessageID` is empty. Re-run live: all three sub-tests PASS — `TestCaptureFallbackPolicy_TP_074_12_FacadeHookCreatesOneFallbackIdea (0.03s)`, `TestCaptureFallbackPolicy_TP_074_12_EligibilityGateBlocksConfirmAndDisambigStates (0.01s)`, `TestCaptureFallbackInviolable_TP_074_18_FacadeHookCannotBeSuppressed (0.03s)`, wrapper EXIT=0. Assistant-package unit regression clean (`go test ./internal/assistant/...` all `ok`). All five SCOPE-074-04A DoD items flipped to `[x]` with live executed evidence; scope status flipped to `Done`. SCOPE-074-04B: created `tests/e2e/assistant/capture_fallback_trigger_e2e_test.go` (TP-074-14 live e2e half) — compiles under `-tags e2e`, vet clean. Live execution BLOCKED: 3 successive runs hit `503 assistant_http_not_ready, facade_invoked=false` for the entire test budget (60s and then 5min); the assistant HTTP late-binding in `cmd/core/wiring.go` `wireAssistantFacade` does not complete on a cold test stack within the test window. Routed as F074-04B-ASSISTANT-HTTP-LATE-BIND-TEST-INFRA. SCOPE-074-04B DoD items remain `[ ]` pending test-infra fix; SCOPE-074-04B implementation seam itself is already wired (same `runCaptureFallback` helper that TP-074-12 / TP-074-18 just proved live).

Validation pass attempting TP-074-14 live e2e per user premise that cross-spec blockers are cleared and core starts healthy. Three execution attempts of `./smackerel.sh test e2e --go-run '^TestAssistantHTTPE2E_CaptureFallbackOpenKnowledgeNoGround$'`: (1) 02:38 UTC rejected immediately by stale test-stack lock (EXIT=73, /tmp/tp074-14.log); (2) 02:48 UTC ran to completion with EXIT=124 — core container failed healthcheck on both first attempt and automatic retry, log /tmp/tp074-14b.log line 229 `container smackerel-test-smackerel-core-1 is unhealthy`, line 259 `FAIL: go-e2e-stack-start (exit=124)`, line 263 `EXIT=124`; (3) 03:02 UTC reached a healthy stack on the second stack-up retry (log /tmp/tp074-14c.log line 250+ shows core Healthy and `/api/health` JSON response, confirming the F074-04B-CORE-SCENARIO-STARTUP foreign blocker IS resolved on this branch by commit 4a883984), BUT the test process was killed mid-run before any go-test PASS/FAIL/EXIT output was written — a parallel agent's `./smackerel.sh test e2e` invocation for spec 072 (PID 840908 started 03:06 UTC) tore down and recreated the smackerel-test Compose project, killing my in-flight test client. No TP-074-14 result captured. SCOPE-074-04B DoD item 'TP-074-14 passes with evidence against the live stack' MUST remain [ ]. New routed finding F074-04B-VALIDATE-TEST-INFRA-CONTENTION raised against operations/scope-workflow owner — multi-agent contention on the single smackerel-test Compose project name with lock files that get rm'd by other agents prevents clean live-stack validation. Spec 074 NOT certified done; returning blocked envelope. SCOPE-074-04A and SCOPE-074-04C prior Done evidence stands. See report.md `## SCOPE-074-04B Validation Pass (bubbles.validate, 2026-06-02)`.
